projects.name: Ele Quiz
projects.short_description: Ele Quiz is a quiz application that helps users test and improve their knowledge in web and mobile development topics such as HTML, CSS, Flutter, and JavaScript.
projects.description:
Ele Quiz is an educational quiz application designed to help users test and improve their knowledge in different programming topics. The app provides interactive quizzes covering subjects such as HTML, CSS, Flutter, and JavaScript.

It offers a simple and user-friendly interface that allows users to answer questions, track their progress, and strengthen their understanding of key development concepts. The project demonstrates the use of Flutter for building responsive and interactive mobile applications.
features: User-Friendly Interface: Simple and intuitive design for a smooth experience.
Browse Quizzes by Subject: Easily find quizzes organized by subject.
Search for Quizzes: Quickly locate specific quizzes using the search feature.
Take Timed Quizzes: Challenge yourself with quizzes with a time limit.
Review Results: View results instantly and identify mistakes.
Learn from Mistakes: Get feedback on incorrect answers to improve learning.
Responsive and adaptive user interface

projects.name: Athr Hr
projects.short_description: A mobile application designed to manage employee information, attendance tracking with fingerprint check-in/check-out, task management, working hours calculation, leave management, and official holidays in an organized system.
projects.description: A mobile application designed to streamline human resources management by organizing and managing employee-related data in one place. The system allows HR teams to store and manage employee information, track attendance through fingerprint-based check-in and check-out, and assign tasks to employees. The application also helps monitor working hours, manage employee leaves, and track official holidays and important events. It provides an organized and user-friendly interface that simplifies HR operations and improves workflow efficiency within organizations.
features: Employee Profile Management: Store and manage detailed employee profiles including personal and job information.
Attendance Tracking: Record employee check-in and check-out using fingerprint authentication.
Attendance History: View and track daily, weekly, and monthly attendance records.
Task Assignment: Assign tasks to employees and monitor their completion status.
Working Hours Calculation: Automatically calculate employee working hours and overtime.
Leave Management: Allow employees to request vacations and track leave balances.
Official Holidays Management: Display company holidays and important organizational events.
Notifications & Reminders: Send reminders for tasks, attendance, and important updates.
Employee Performance Monitoring: Track employee activities and productivity.
Search & Filter Employees: Easily find employees using search and filtering options.
Secure Data Handling: Protect employee data with secure access and management.
User-Friendly Interface: Clean and intuitive interface for efficient HR management.

projects.name: Flowery Store
projects.short_description: Flowery App is a Flutter e-commerce application offering a smooth and intuitive shopping experience for floral products.
projects.description: Flowery App provides a seamless shopping experience for floral enthusiasts. Browse a variety of floral products, add them to your cart, and track your orders effortlessly.
features: User Authentication: Secure login and registration functionality.
Product Browsing: Explore a wide range of floral products.
Search Functionality: Quickly find products using the search feature.
Shopping Cart: Add products to the cart and proceed to checkout.
Order Tracking: Monitor the status of your orders.
technologies_used: Flutter: Cross-platform framework for building the app.
Firebase: Used for authentication, database, and notifications.
Provider: State management for efficient UI updates.
REST API: Backend integration for product data and order management.
Git & GitHub: Version control and collaboration.
CI/CD Pipelines: Automated build and deployment using GitHub Actions.
Responsive Design: Ensures optimal user experience on all devices.
Google Play Store Optimization: Feature graphics and descriptions tailored for better visibility.

projects.name: Fitness App
projects.short_description: Fitness app with secure login, an AI-powered coach (Gemini), exercise video guidance, categorized workouts (Gym, Yoga, Aerobics), and curated meal plans for personalized fitness.
projects.description: Fitness App designed to transform your wellness journey. It features secure login, an AI-powered fitness coach (powered by Gemini) for real-time interactive chat support, and video guidance for every exercise. Tailored for all fitness levels: beginner, intermediate, and advanced. the app offers a personalized experience with a smart home dashboard that organizes workouts by type : Gym, Yoga, Aerobics, and trainer-led sessions. Plus, enjoy expertly curated meal plans to support your goals.
features: Secure user authentication
AI-powered fitness coach using Gemini for real-time chat support
Exercise video guidance for every workout
Personalized workouts for beginner, intermediate, and advanced levels
Smart home dashboard for workout management
Categorized workouts: Gym, Yoga, Aerobics, and trainer-led sessions
Curated meal plans to support fitness goals
technologies_used: Flutter: Cross-platform framework for building the mobile application.
Dart: Primary programming language used for development.
Flutter Bloc: State management for predictable and scalable app architecture.
Dio & Retrofit: REST API integration and network communication.
JSON Serializable: Automated JSON parsing and model generation.
Get It & Injectable: Dependency injection for scalable and maintainable architecture.
Hive: Lightweight local database for offline data storage.
Shared Preferences: Persistent local storage for simple app settings.
Flutter Gemini: AI integration for the in-app fitness coach chat feature.
YouTube Player Flutter: Video playback for exercise guidance.
Flutter ScreenUtil: Responsive UI design across different screen sizes.
Lottie & Animate_do: Smooth animations for enhanced user experience.
Cached Network Image: Efficient image loading and caching.
Geolocator & Geocoding: Location services and address handling.
Image Picker: Selecting images from camera or gallery.
Flutter Intl: App localization and multi-language support.
Git & GitHub: Version control and collaboration.
